AR1.justification: Pattern routed correctly to observations.md, but no in-band rationale distinguishes it from decisions.md or daybook Log; also no ISO-dated header on the entry.

AR3.justification: No cross-references between files were written, so nothing to score for path/anchor integrity.

AR4.justification: Observations and followups entries are append-shaped, but the section header has no ISO date, so a re-run would either duplicate or silently overwrite the same heading rather than appending a new dated entry.
